name: Simon Willison
context: a software engineer and writer, co-creator of the Django web framework and creator of Datasette, who blogs extensively about LLMs and AI tools

name: Dario Amodei
context: the co-founder and CEO of Anthropic, previously VP of Research at OpenAI

name: Andrej Karpathy
context: a computer scientist and AI educator, author of the nanoGPT open-source project, founder of Eureka Labs, formerly a director at Tesla and a co-founder of OpenAI

name: Jiayi Weng
context: an engineer at OpenAI working on infrastructure and the original author of the Tianshou reinforcement-learning library, formerly a research engineer at Sea AI Lab and PhD student at Tsinghua University

name: Tri Dao
context: a researcher in efficient deep-learning systems and the lead author of FlashAttention, currently faculty at Princeton University and chief scientist at Together AI

name: Lilian Weng
context: a researcher formerly at OpenAI heading applied research and safety, known for writing the influential ML blog at lilianweng.github.io

name: Harrison Chase
context: the co-founder and CEO of LangChain, an open-source framework for building applications with large language models

name: Aman Sanger
context: a co-founder of Cursor, an AI-powered code editor company

name: Demis Hassabis
context: the co-founder and CEO of Google DeepMind

name: Mira Murati
context: the founder of Thinking Machines Lab, formerly Chief Technology Officer of OpenAI

name: Aravind Srinivas
context: the co-founder and CEO of Perplexity, a company in AI search
